creator: support@merchantpark.com
text:
boot from fresh boot floppies of kern.flp and mfsroot.flp.. detects everything fine.. hangs on "mounting root from ufs:/dev/md0c"

tried making NEW boot disks on BRAND NEW 1.44disks, downloaded in BIN format and created using fdimage.exe in PURE DOS.. same result..

tried new ram... same result! download and burnt 4.4-install.iso.. same RESULT!!

How-To-Repeat: looks like maybe be an AMD-K6/2 CPU issue

my machine is AMD K6/2 450MHz, P5MVP3 Motherboard, 64Mb RAM, 10gig WD HD
Oak Tech vid card, 3com 3509b NIc card, mitsumi cr-588 cdrom
